headline: Insulet Device Correction Puts Omnipod Safety And Valuation In Focus
summary: Insulet, ticker NasdaqGS:PODD, has issued a voluntary medical device correction for certain Omnipod insulin pods due to a manufacturing defect. The defect can cause insulin leakage and under-delivery, which has been linked to serious adverse health events such as diabetic ketoacidosis. The company is working to replace affected pods globally and has implemented corrective actions in its manufacturing process. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:PODD, this correction is a material operational...
